en: Any tool used for work (including laptops, tablets and related electrical accessories) is considered work equipment. The scope of these requirements are applied proportionately to the nature, complexity and risk level of the equipment and activities performed e.g. low risk IT equipment such as a laptop used on site does not have the same requirements as industrial machinery.
Articles 70, 71, 72 Legislative Decree 81 - Consolidated Act on Health & Safety at Work
